title: 2023 Oct 29 The Spiral Path
justification: This talk directly addresses 'The Spiral Path' as its central theme, offering a complete and systematic exposition of the teaching from the Upanisa Sutta. It provides clear entry points (faith, investigation, virtue, restraint, dedication, mindfulness, inspiration), traces the progression through gladness, rapture, tranquility, happiness, and samadhi, and grounds abstract concepts in practical daily-life examples like responding to climate change news. The talk has excellent literary qualities with accessible language, personal anecdotes, and a coherent structure that can serve as a strong spine for additional material.
summary: Bhante Bodhidhamma presents the spiral path teaching from the Upanisa Sutta, explaining seven entry points from dukkha into the liberating spiral and tracing the progression through gladness, rapture, tranquility, happiness, and samadhi. The talk emphasizes practical application in daily life, using climate change anxiety as a worked example throughout.

relevance.note: Explicitly titled and focused on spiral path teaching
